{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030749F87B01EDEFB09E79DD38"}"},"total":141},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7538905118602052414","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一部兼具文学性与可读性的优秀作品，作者的文字功底令人叹服。叙事视角独特，通过多线并进的方式展现故事的多个维度，最终巧妙汇集成一个完整的图景。人物塑造立体丰满，即使是配角也都有血有肉，令人难忘。本人乃小白作者，请也对我作品《长空一啸拏云志》多多批评指点，谢谢！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755306371,"group_id":"7379947953433103422","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"三尺龙剑万卷书 上天生我意何如","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyLlGA769jW+Y/GmE+T9+EJL64z7VkrYBx3w1+I4Sz1i","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9f9ff5d2d5644bc789f188887212e0db~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796008&x-signature=h67C3%2BM8OoArZyK0gtsKPTEC95Y%3D","user_id":"3527713041940988","user_name":"齐迹宝剑锋从磨砺出"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3527713041940988","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7379947953433103422","book_info":{"abstract":"本书改编短剧（从傻子到救世主）已经上线，大家可以去看看。
桃园村，一个靠山吃山的小山村。
一次意外，让村里留下不少孤儿寡母。
林天从部队被迫退役，带着一身本事回到昔日的家乡桃园村。
他利用自己的能力，带着村民致富，开酒店，开公司，一步步再次走向巅峰。
闲来给大佬治治病，跟美女谈谈心，教训一下欺男霸女的富二代，生活逍遥自在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ba6a0457f304fc0d798c4a08e5a096b4","author":"六月斜阳","author_id":"","book_id":"7379947953433103422","book_name":"村野乡情","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7379948237848855102","read_count":"12805","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2616333"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"1245","tags":"都市修真,都市,乡村,神医,多女主,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c532153ed1dab6c4329cb18b315a64c9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390469&x-signature=VTuEwv5dvJACrGZxmyU0E4eTywM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"100225873797","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"108"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030749F87B01EDEFB09E79DD38"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
